# NovaSight Spark Jobs Directory
# ================================
# This directory contains PySpark job files generated by NovaSight.
#
# Jobs are automatically generated from the PySpark App Builder
# and saved here for execution via Airflow's SparkSubmitOperator.
#
# Directory is mounted to:
# - Airflow containers: /opt/spark/jobs
# - Spark workers: /opt/spark/work
#
# Job files follow the naming convention:
#   {app_name_slug}.py
#
# Example: staff_records.py
